title: valeriana kotschyi
intro: Valeriana kotschyi, also known as the Persian valerian or red valerian, is a perennial plant species belonging to the valerian family (Valerianaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, antispasmodic, and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Valeriana kotschyi include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of restlessness and irritability. The herbal preparation of Valeriana kotschyi is typically in the form of dried roots, which can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal use.
